main.tlua(4,7): error TS2322: Type '"push"' is not assignable to type 'keyof [string, boolean]'.
shapes.d.tlua(6,72): error TS2344: Type 'string' does not satisfy the constraint 'keyof [number, ...T]'.
  Type '"push"' is not assignable to type 'number | "length"'.


==== shapes.d.tlua (1 errors) ====
    declare pair: [string, boolean];
    
    // The default type argument `"push"` is validated against the constraint
    // `keyof [number, ...T]` while `T` is still generic. A tuple has no `push`
    // member, so this default is not a valid key of the tuple.
    interface KeyBox<T extends unknown[], K extends keyof [number, ...T] = "push"> {
                                                                           ~~~~~~
!!! error TS2344: Type 'string' does not satisfy the constraint 'keyof [number, ...T]'.
!!! error TS2344:   Type '"push"' is not assignable to type 'number | "length"'.
      key: K;
    }
    
==== main.tlua (1 errors) ====
    // Numeric indices and `length` are keys of the tuple; Array method names are not.
    local ok0: keyof typeof pair = 0;
    local okLen: keyof typeof pair = "length";
    local bad: keyof typeof pair = "push";
          ~~~
!!! error TS2322: Type '"push"' is not assignable to type 'keyof [string, boolean]'.
    
    local es = {ok0, okLen};
